title: Cleanblock 16x
description: a texture pack overlay that adds clean block textures for faster pvp. the placebo effect makes you play better (trust me🥀)
body:
![Cleanblock 16x](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/44d673ae167d78a66a50e8628714d6bb7d674792.png)

### Clean blocks for your Minecraft that make you play focused
### 
- Lightweight (like seriously only 367 KB)
- All block textures are clean and 16x
- Makes you better

![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/02712516f92cfab5e5cdd792379749cd7472fde6.png)

![Cleanblocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/def7eb7f9542322d057ce7f8c4b5f141ee98384f.png)

> _I created it a long time ago, and unfortunately I didn't note credits for some original textures. If you want to claim credits, please feel free to contact me._
